Name: FAnimNode_SpringBone
Description: Simple controller that replaces or adds to the translationrotation of a single bone.

Variables.Name: SpringBone
Variables.Description: Name of bone to control. This is the main bone chain to modify from.

Variables.Name: bLimitDisplacement
Variables.Description: Limit the amount that a bone can stretch from its ref-pose length.

Variables.Name: MaxDisplacement
Variables.Description: If bLimitDisplacement is true, this indicates how long a bone can stretch beyond its length in the ref-pose.

Variables.Name: ErrorResetThresh
Variables.Description: If spring stretches more than this, reset it. Useful for catching teleports etc

Variables.Name: bNoZSpring_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: If true, Z position is always correct, no spring applied

Variables.Name: bTranslateX
Variables.Description: If true take the spring calculation for translation in X

Variables.Name: bTranslateY
Variables.Description: If true take the spring calculation for translation in Y

Variables.Name: bTranslateZ
Variables.Description: If true take the spring calculation for translation in Z

Variables.Name: bRotateX
Variables.Description: If true take the spring calculation for rotation in X

Variables.Name: bRotateY
Variables.Description: If true take the spring calculation for rotation in Y

Variables.Name: bRotateZ
Variables.Description: If true take the spring calculation for rotation in Z
